title: Wisconsin DDS Specialist Rates — Class Codes Confirmed, Pay Range Not Extractable
description: Wisconsin DDS classifications with confirmed class codes (Disability Determination Specialist = 49201; Disability Determination Supervisor = 49220) located by string search in the 229-page 2025-27 Compensation Plan, but the code-to-pay-range crosswalk could NOT be extracted (encoded PDF tables spread across NOREP / Schedule 07 grids). No scheduled dollar amounts in the file; only a ZipRecruiter market estimate (~$60,202 mean; $48,400–$65,600). Non-represented post-Act-10 (compensation set legislatively).

columns.name: class_codes.<code>.title
columns.description: Classification title for the WI class code (49201 Specialist / 49220 Supervisor).

source.publisher: Wisconsin Division of Personnel Management (DPM); WI DHS Disability Determination Bureau
source.title: Wisconsin 2025-27 Compensation Plan (class codes located; pay range not extractable; ZipRecruiter estimate)

notes: Computed (≈ estimate): class codes 49201/49220 confirmed by string-search in the official 2025-27 Comp Plan PDF, but the codes-to-pay-range crosswalk requires reading encoded multi-grid tables that could not be extracted — so no scheduled dollar amounts. The only quantitative figure is a ZipRecruiter market-rate estimate (mean ~$60,202; range $48,400–$65,600, Apr 2026). Non-represented post-Wisconsin Act 10 (2011); pay set legislatively with $1.00 service-anniversary differentials at 5/7/10 yrs. extraction_status is 'partial'.
